reasoning: There are currently no CDC Travel Health Notices for Yellow Fever in any North American country. Given the short time horizon (approx. 5 weeks until June 1, 2025), the probability of a new Yellow Fever outbreak emerging in a North American country (such as Panama or Trinidad & Tobago) AND triggering a formal CDC Travel Health Notice within this specific timeframe is extremely low.
